brand-story-image.query: Jewelry That Holds Meaning At Velmora, we believe jewelry should be more than an accessory — it should tell a story. Each piece is handcrafted with 18K gold plating, designed to be worn every day and cherished for years. We source ethically, price transparently, and design with intention.
